# Data Reordering → Transpose

*Auto-generated from CEVA-XC4500 Vec-C Intrinsics documentation*

---

Main table → Data Reordering → Transpose

Transpose

Instruction Type and Width      Instruction description
                                Performs transpose of vertical complex number vector within a
                                matrix into an horizontal complex vector destination. Each
Vector Complex Transpose
                                complex source consists of real 32-bit part and imaginary 32-bit
                                part.
                                Performs transpose of vertical double-word vector within a
Vector Transpose Double Words
                                matrix into an horizontal double-word vector destination.
                                Performs transpose of vertical word vector within a matrix into
Vector Transpose Words
                                an horizontal word vector destination.
